use_cases: Selecting between multiple options in a settings panel
Creating segmented controls for view switching
Filtering content with mutually exclusive options
Switching between display modes or categories
ai_summary: A toggle button group component using react-aria-components for accessible toggle controls. Supports default and outline variants with small, medium, and large sizes. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling across variants, featuring hover, focus-visible, and selected states with proper accessibility attributes.
